title: 8 Herbal Tinctures For Viral Hepatitis
description: Echinacea purpurea tinctures contains alkylamides, glycoproteins, and phenolic acids, which are its main bioactive constituents. These compounds work together to boost the immune system and help fight off infections. The glycoproteins in Echinacea purpurea have anti-inflammatory properties, which can reduce liver inflammation and damage caused by viral hepatitis. The phenolic acids also have antioxidant properties, which can protect liver cells from oxidative stress and damage. By redu...
